summary: Final verification pass before controlled launch completed. All 19 backend API tests passed (100%). HomeBusinessSolutionsSection now integrated on homepage. RuntimeStatusCard integrated on Launch Readiness page showing 4 integrations. Admin pages verified: Launch QA Checklist (15 items), Business Pricing Admin (stats + filter), Numbering Rules (6 rules + preview). Customer portal verified: Dashboard with metrics, Business Profile page with all form fields.

homepage_business_solutions_section.notes: HomeBusinessSolutionsSection now integrated in HomepageV2Content.jsx. Shows 3 solution cards (Marketplace Products, Business Services, Country Expansion), Request Quote and Explore Services CTA buttons present.

runtime_status_card.notes: RuntimeStatusCard integrated in LaunchReadinessPage. Shows 4 integrations: Resend (Missing), KwikPay (Missing), Stripe (Missing), MongoDB (Configured).

admin_login_and_dashboard.notes: Staff login works with admin@konekt.co.tz credentials. Dashboard shows Campaign Performance, Monthly Revenue, Total Orders (8), Total Customers (11), Active Products (40).

launch_qa_checklist.notes: All 15 checklist items present and interactive. Progress tracker works (shows 2/15 checked after clicking 2 items). Items toggle correctly.

business_pricing_admin.notes: Stats cards showing Total: 2, Pending: 2, etc. Status filter dropdown works. 2 pending requests displayed with Mark Contacted, Qualify, Decline action buttons.

numbering_rules.notes: Form with Entity Type, Entity Code, Format String present. Preview button works (generated KON-SKU-1F1JQ9). 6 configured rules displayed (Invoice, Order, Quote, Service Request, SKU, Test Entity).

launch_readiness.notes: Readiness Score 7/8 shown. Checks grid showing has_products, has_variants, has_creative_services, has_banners, has_warehouses, has_company_name (OK), has_tax_config (Missing), has_currency (OK). Data Counts section present. Manual Final Checklist section present. Export PDF button present.

customer_dashboard.notes: Dashboard loads with metrics: Active Orders, Pending Quotes, Unpaid Invoices, Loyalty Points. Quick Actions: Browse Marketplace, Request Service, View Quotes, View Invoices. Recent Orders section present.

customer_business_profile.notes: All form fields present: Company Name, Buying As, Order Frequency, Main Interest, Monthly Budget Range, Categories of Interest, Preferred Contact Method, Urgent Need, Multi-location, Needs contract pricing, Needs recurring support. Form is editable. Save Profile button present.

checkout_page.notes: Empty cart state shows correctly with 'Your cart is empty' message and Browse Products button. Checkout form fields verified (data-testid attributes present).

staff_login.notes: Staff Sign In page loads. Login form with email/password fields works. Redirects to /admin dashboard on successful login.

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed ESLint error in ServiceDetailContent.jsx - removed conditional useContext hook usage (was using createContext inside function). Changed to simple localStorage helper function.
HomeBusinessSolutionsSection and RuntimeStatusCard components are now properly integrated (issue from iteration 57 resolved).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Final verification pass complete. All admin pages functional: Launch QA Checklist (15 items), Business Pricing Admin (2 pending requests), Numbering Rules (6 rules), Launch Readiness (7/8 score with RuntimeStatusCard). Customer portal working with dashboard metrics and business profile. HomeBusinessSolutionsSection on homepage. Checkout page handles empty cart correctly. ESLint error in ServiceDetailContent.jsx fixed.
